title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bata India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bata India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bata India:
Bata India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
